targetDate.title: Target date
targetDate.description: Date to fetch in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today (US/Eastern). Use for backfill.

supabaseServiceKey.title: Supabase service role key
supabaseServiceKey.description: Supabase service role key (not the anon key). Keep this secret.

calibrationMode.title: Calibration mode
calibrationMode.description: If true, downloads the file and dumps the first 5 raw records to the dataset for field position verification. Does NOT upsert to Supabase. Run this once when first setting up to verify field positions against the official Corporate File Definitions page.

dryRun.title: Dry run
dryRun.description: If true, parses and normalises records but does NOT upsert to Supabase. Useful for testing the parser.
